arts.ttl: Team News: Atalanta BC vs. Real Madrid injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Tuesday's Champions League clash between Atalanta BC and Real Madrid.

arts.ttl: Fede Valverde: “It’s messed up seeing Real Madrid 24th, we’re not used to it”
arts.sum: Real Madrid put forward midfielder Fede Valverde to speak ahead of Tuesday night’s Champions League tie with Atalanta in Italy, as the midfielder described the club’s current position in the Champions League table by saying “it’s messed up, obviously. I want to be of service to the team, to give my best wherever I’m put and wherever I’m needed.

arts.ttl: Gasperini: “Are Real Madrid in crisis? Not in my opinion….”
arts.sum: As Atalanta gears up for their UEFA Champions League clash against Real Madrid on Tuesday, head coach Gian Piero Gasperini addressed the media, reflecting on the team's recent successes and the challenges ahead. arts.ttl: Real Madrid pursuit of Man Utd star Amorim loves CONFIRMED
arts.sum: Real Madrid have a concrete interest in Manchester United full-back Diogo Dalot, but the Red Devils are 'adamant' that he is not for sale, according to a report. Real Madrid pursuit of Man Utd star Amorim loves CONFIRMED

arts.ttl: Ancelotti: “Endrick is staying at Real Madrid, as is Arda Güler”
arts.sum: Real Madrid coach Carlo Ancelotti spoke to the media ahead of the crucial Champions League game against Atalanta in Bergamo on Tuesday night, with the Italian telling the press on Monday evening that everyone in his squad has a role to play, stating that “Endrick is staying here, as is Güler. arts.sum: Real Madrid's Jude Bellingham and five Premier League stars make the FIFPRO Men's World XI for 2024 as Inter Miami star Lionel Messi misses out.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid star admits to trouble sleeping following recent performance
arts.sum: Few players in the Real Madrid squad sweat as much for the club as Fede Valverde, and when things go wrong, he has admitted that it has a big impact on him. arts.sum: On this episode of the Managing Madrid Podcast, Kiyan Sobhani and Jose Perez discuss: What’s changed since the Super Cup matchup between Atalanta and Real Madrid ?

arts.ttl: Carlo Ancelotti puts his faith in Endrick and Arda Güler as he shares his plans for the Real Madrid duo
